summary: Tested Advocacy 'New Recommendation' page improvements. Backend: 27/27 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working - URL param pre-fill (athlete+school), athlete context card, fit reason chips toggle, attachments section, school search autocomplete, SchoolPod Advocate button, outcome tracking tabs.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/advocacy/athlete-context/{athlete_id}/{school_id} - Returns athlete info (name, position, grad_year, team, momentum), pipeline_status, last_contact, event_notes, highlight_video
GET /api/advocacy/athletes?q=Emma - Returns filtered athletes with id, name, grad_year, position, team, photo_url for autocomplete
POST /api/advocacy/recommendations - Now accepts attachments array [{type: 'highlight_reel', url: '...'}]
POST /api/ai/advocacy-draft accepts body params: fit_reasons[], fit_note, highlight_video
RecommendationBuilder.js uses useSearchParams for athlete and schoolName URL params
AthleteContextCard displays pipeline_status, last_contact, momentum_score, momentum_trend, school_targets
SchoolPod.js has Advocate button (Megaphone icon) that navigates to /advocacy/new?athlete={athleteId}&schoolName={university_name}
AdvocacyHome.js tabs include: All, Draft, Sent, Waiting Response, Warm, Closed
seed_data_creation: Created test recommendations with attachments during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Advocacy recommendation builder fully implemented. Key features: 1) URL params ?athlete=athlete_1&schoolName=Stanford%20University pre-fill athlete and school. 2) Athlete context card shows name, position, grad_year, team, pipeline_status, last_contact, momentum, targets. 3) Fit reason chips are toggle buttons with checkmark when selected. 4) Attachments section allows adding highlight_reel, profile_link, video_clip URLs. 5) School search uses /schools/search endpoint with autocomplete. 6) SchoolPod has Advocate button in hero section that navigates with pre-fill. 7) AdvocacyHome tabs: Draft, Sent, Waiting Response, Warm, Closed for outcome tracking.

frontend_ui: Advocacy home page loads with all outcome tabs (All, Draft, Sent, Waiting Response, Warm, Closed) - PASS
New Recommendation button visible and clickable - PASS
Recommendation builder page loads at /advocacy/new - PASS
Athlete context card displays: name, position, grad_year, team, pipeline_status (Campus Visit), last_contact, momentum (9), targets (7 schools) - PASS
Fit reason chips clickable and toggle state correctly (Athletic ability, Academic fit selected) - PASS
Attachments section has Add button - PASS
Adding attachment creates row with type dropdown and URL input - PASS
Attachment types available: Highlight Reel, Athlete Profile, Video Clip - PASS
AI Draft button present and enabled when athlete+school selected - PASS
SchoolPod page has Advocate button with Megaphone icon in hero action buttons - PASS

verified_requirements.schoolpod_advocate_button: PASS - Button in hero section navigates with pre-fill params
verified_requirements.outcome_tracking_tabs: PASS - All, Draft, Sent, Waiting Response, Warm, Closed tabs present
